creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #68)

I perfectly know what you mean. I went through this with Python on HP-UX and gave up after a few PRs. Quite sad. Although, I cannot tell how receptive the Samba team is compared to the huge Python one.

Let's make this work first and reconsider end of year since this is the only current working version and should not fail/disappear on FreeBSD in the near future.

Thanks!
